title: Verilator stuck in an infinite loop when the module has only output signals.
body:
Hello:

I found that verilator would stuck in a infinite loop when the following conditions were met:
1. The RTL module has only output signals.
2. Verilate cmd must include `--sc` and `--trace`

--- 
For example:
```verilog
// demo.v
module t (
    output  [2:0] id0,
    output  [2:0] id1,
    output  [2:0] id2,
    output  [2:0] id3
);

assign id0 = 3;
assign id1 = 0;
assign id2 = 2;
assign id3 = 1;

endmodule
```
```
 verilator demo.v --sc --trace
```
I'm using verilator-4.106
